title: 50Pcs Grey Wall Plugs Plasterboard, 12mm Raw Screw Plugs Plastic Fish Type Extension Raw Plugs Fixings for Masonry Effective Mounting of TV's Mirrors Screw
features: MATERIAL : The expansion anchor is made of Plastic material,flexible, not easy to break, can provide strong support, matching galvanised screws, carbon steel galvanised process

EASY TO USE : Just use a drill to drill holes at the marked points, then hammer the wall anchor into the hole, place the fixing parts, and finally use a screwdriver to screw the self-tapping screw into the wall anchor for fixing.

PRACTICAL DESIGN : The split in the ribbed wall anchors adopt an expansion curve design, will expand on two opposing sides as you tightening the screw, which greatly enhances the anchoring force, prevent the wall anchor from turning in the hole.

WIDE APPLICATION : Suitable for haging installing and fixing hardware, kitchen tools, electrical equipment, shelves, lamps, mirrors, photo frames, curtains, TV brackets, hooks, etc. Ideal for the garden, home and office appliance, etc.
PACKAGE INCLUDES : You will get 500 pcs Grey extension wall plugs , 3 sizes of 12mm. Can be used for solid bricks, concrete, lime-sand bricks, high-pored bricks, and other wall materials.
description: Type : Wall Plug Size :12mm Color: Grey Material: plastic Package included :50 pieces wall plug Style :Modern Specific Uses: Dry Wall
